prompt: Find the TaskProfile interface in the codebase, count how many fields it has, then search for all places where a TaskProfile is constructed (look for object literals with 'type' and 'complexity' fields)
List all packages in the monorepo, then sample 5 of their package.json files and tell me which of them depend on @brainst0rm/shared

Trace the flow of a user message through the system: find where user input enters (CLI), how it gets to the agent loop, how the router classifies it, and how streamText is called. Reference specific files.
Find all the routing strategies in packages/router/src/strategies/, read each one, and rank them by how many lines of code they contain (most to least)
Find all error classes defined in the codebase that extend Error, list them with their file locations, and explain the error hierarchy
Read the turbo.json configuration, then check 3 different package.json files to verify they all have the expected scripts (build, test, dev, typecheck) that turbo expects
Find all places where the createLogger function from @brainst0rm/shared is called, list the logger names that are passed to it, and check if there's a central logger configuration
Find the cost tracking system: where costs are recorded, where they're queried, and what budget enforcement exists. Give me file paths and brief descriptions.
Sample 5 packages from packages/ — read each one's package.json — and list what other @brainst0rm/* packages each of them depends on
Find the session management code (SessionManager class), understand how sessions are created/resumed/forked, and tell me what database table(s) are involved
